description: Verify Digital Office host rule injection for clean Hermes/OpenClaw installs and guarded behavior for non-clean hosts.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; ./install.sh --host hermes --target "$tmp/hermes-clean" --no-check >/dev/null; test -f "$tmp/hermes-clean/SOUL.md"; grep -q 'digital-office-managed-entrypoint' "$tmp/hermes-clean/SOUL.md"; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-clean" --no-check >/dev/null; test -f "$tmp/openclaw-clean/AGENTS.md"; grep -q 'secretary Agent' "$tmp/openclaw-clean/AGENTS.md"; mkdir -p "$tmp/openclaw-dirty"; printf '# Existing local rules\n' > "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/AGENTS.md"; set +e; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-dirty" --no-check > "$tmp/dirty.out" 2> "$tmp/dirty.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; grep -q 'Choose --preserve-existing' "$tmp/dirty.err"; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-dirty" --preserve-existing --no-check >/dev/null; grep -q 'Existing local rules' "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/AGENTS.md"; test -f "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/digital-office/AGENTS.md"; ./install.sh --host openclaw --target "$tmp/openclaw-dirty" --overwrite-existing --no-check >/dev/null; grep -q 'digital-office-managed-entrypoint' "$tmp/openclaw-dirty/AGENTS.md"; ls "$tmp/openclaw-dirty"/AGENTS.md.before-digital-office.* >/dev/null

set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; mkdir -p "$tmp/source"; cp -a agent-system profiles scripts skills SOUL.md README.md README.zh-CN.md CHANGELOG.md install.sh update "$tmp/source/"; mkdir -p "$tmp/source/profiles/office-writer" "$tmp/source/agent-system/runs/source-leak"; printf 'source-secret' > "$tmp/source/profiles/office-writer/auth.json"; printf '{"secret":true}' > "$tmp/source/agent-system/runs/source-leak/run.json"; "$tmp/source/install.sh" --host hermes --target "$tmp/target" --no-check >/dev/null; test ! -e "$tmp/target/profiles/office-writer/auth.json"; test ! -e "$tmp/target/agent-system/runs/source-leak/run.json"; test -d "$tmp/target/agent-system/projects/_template"; test -f "$tmp/target/CHANGELOG.md"; mkdir -p "$tmp/target/agent-system/settings" "$tmp/target/agent-system/runs/personal" "$tmp/target/profiles/office-writer"; printf 'personal-preference' > "$tmp/target/agent-system/settings/user-preferences.md"; printf '{"personal":true}' > "$tmp/target/agent-system/runs/personal/run.json"; printf 'target-secret' > "$tmp/target/profiles/office-writer/auth.json"; "$tmp/source/update" --source "$tmp/source" --host hermes --target "$tmp/target" --no-check >/dev/null; grep -q 'personal-preference' "$tmp/target/agent-system/settings/user-preferences.md"; grep -q 'personal' "$tmp/target/agent-system/runs/personal/run.json"; grep -q 'target-secret' "$tmp/target/profiles/office-writer/auth.json"; test -x "$tmp/target/update"
